seoTitle: Rathdowney vs Ravenshoe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rathdowney and Ravenshoe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rathdowney and Ravenshoe.
heading: Rathdowney vs Ravenshoe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rathdowney, Queensland and Ravenshoe, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ravenshoe has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Rathdowney (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rathdowney or Ravenshoe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rathdowney has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Ravenshoe scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rathdowney scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Ravenshoe scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rathdowney or Ravenshoe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ravenshoe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
